summary: Frontend-only testing of UniFiDevices page at /unifi-devices. All major features verified via Playwright.

issues: GW 'UDM-SE' box appears far left with large empty horizontal gap before switch column - layout works correctly but visually the GW box occupies only a small fraction of the wide column width

critical_code_review_comments: IP address text color '#1E3448' in NodeBox is very dark on the dark '#05050E' background - essentially invisible. May be intentional for secondary info but worth reviewing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 test criteria passed: tab strip with ALL SITES + 8 site tabs present, SITES=8 DEVICES=116 OFFLINE=2 DEMO DATA shown in header, ALL SITES shows 4-col grid with mini topology cards, Canton topology shows UDM-SE GW + 4 switches + 22 endpoints with U6-Pro-08 in red and badge '1', Novi HQ/Constantine topologies load correctly, refresh button works, no JS errors.
